violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Spray found at 0ppm Chlorine.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -No chlorine test strips available at time of inspection.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of ware wash machine. -Dishwasher had inconsistent rinse cycle, 143, 135, 158F. *158F achieved after unit had sat during inspection but then temp gauges immediately fell after that cycle. *Recommend using 3 comp sink with chlorine sani sink solution of 50ppm if rinse gauge is not consistently between 180-195F.
